# React Native Chart Kit

> React Native Chart Kit provides composable charts for React Native, including public v2 charts and licensed Chart Kit Pro chart workflows.

## Primary Docs

- [Installation](/docs/react-native/getting-started/installation)
- [Contributing](/docs/react-native/getting-started/contributing)
- [Troubleshooting](/docs/react-native/troubleshooting)
- [Migration from v1](/docs/react-native/migration/from-v1)
- [Prop mapping](/docs/react-native/migration/prop-mapping)

## Public Charts

- [Line chart](/docs/react-native/charts/line)
- [Area chart](/docs/react-native/charts/area)
- [Bar chart](/docs/react-native/charts/bar)
- [Pie chart](/docs/react-native/charts/pie)
- [Donut chart](/docs/react-native/charts/donut)
- [Progress chart](/docs/react-native/charts/progress)
- [Contribution heatmap](/docs/react-native/charts/contribution-heatmap)
- [Themes](/docs/react-native/charts/themes)
- [Accessibility](/docs/react-native/charts/accessibility)

## Pro Charts

- [Pro installation](/docs/react-native/charts/pro-installation)
- [Candlebar chart](/docs/react-native/charts/candlebar)
- [Radar chart](/docs/react-native/charts/radar)
- [Combo chart](/docs/react-native/charts/combo)

## Source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/chart-kit/react-native-chart-kit)
- [Agent instructions](https://github.com/chart-kit/react-native-chart-kit/blob/master/AGENTS.md)
